---
name: True Cost number challenge
about: Flag a number on /ai-true-cost that you believe is wrong
labels: ["true-cost", "review-needed"]
---

## Product

Which AI product does this number appear on?
(e.g., ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, MagicSchool Free)

## Which number is wrong

Which specific number or cost component do you believe is incorrect?
(e.g., "Compute cost for ChatGPT Plus is listed as $0.00 — this seems too low")

## What should it be and why

What do you believe the correct number is, and what is your primary source?

Please link directly to the source (a research paper, financial filing, analyst report, or official pricing page). A pull-quote from the source is very helpful.

**Proposed value:**

**Primary source URL:**

**Pull-quote from source:**

## Anything else

Any additional context, related numbers, or caveats we should know about?

---

_Thank you for helping keep these numbers honest. Every challenge is reviewed by the maintainer and, if valid, will result in a dated entry in the [changelog](/en/ai-true-cost/changelog)._
